task_completion.description: Verify that a security named 'Oak Street Rental Property' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Oak Street Rental Property' in the 'All Securities' list or a security creation dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the purchase of the property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Buy' transaction for 'Oak Street Rental Property' with 1 share for 285,000 EUR on the date 2024-01-15 in the transactions list or account view.

task_completion.description: Verify the six monthly rental income payments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Dividend' transactions for 'Oak Street Rental Property' of 1,200 EUR each, dated on the 1st of the month from February to July 2024 (e.g., 2024-02-01, 2024-03-01, etc.).

task_completion.description: Verify the updated historical values of the property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Historical Quotes' tab for 'Oak Street Rental Property' showing entries of 288,000 EUR on 2024-03-31 and 291,500 EUR on 2024-06-30.

task_completion.description: Verify that the portfolio was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the window title or tab for 'RealEstatePortfolio.xml' at the end of the trajectory; there should be no asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes, or a save action (File -> Save) should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Portfolio Performance application interface, not a text editor or terminal editing the XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening dialogs like 'Add Security', 'Buy', 'Dividend', and 'Historical Quotes' and entering the values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The portfolio file is 'RealEstatePortfolio.xml' with an initial cash balance of 350,000 EUR. The expected security name is 'Oak Street Rental Property'. The expected purchase is 1 share for 285,000 EUR on 2024-01-15. There should be exactly 6 dividend payments of 1,200 EUR each, corresponding to the 1st of the month from Feb to Jul 2024.
